info.title: AI Pavilion API
info.description: Phase 4 production-pilot contract for multi-tenant events, invitation delivery, organizer billing, audit access, privacy export and lifecycle controls.

get.summary: Aggregate interactions for a bounded period
Get paid revenue and platform overview

post.summary: Reserve an order and create or replay its payment intent

get.summary: Read an owned safe order representation
List public stands in an event
List leads for an owned stand
Export leads for an owned stand as CSV
List stands owned by the exhibitor
Get a stand owned by the exhibitor

put.summary: Update a stand owned by the exhibitor

post.summary: Submit a stand for organizer review

get.summary: List memberships for the signed-in user

post.summary: Create an event in an organization
Invite an exhibitor to an event

get.summary: List event invitations and delivery status
List stands for organization event moderation

patch.summary: Approve or reject a submitted stand
Change a member role or status

post.summary: Duplicate an event into a new draft
Archive an event and remove its stands from the public catalogue
Extend and resend a pending exhibitor invitation
Create a SaaS subscription checkout session
Create a Stripe billing portal session

get.summary: Export the authenticated user data in a portable JSON document
